{{Quote|Torture, or repair?|ADK-25-MED unit|audio=Tortureorrepair.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''ADK-25-MED''' was a type of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] employed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The droids often replied to their commander with quotes such as '"sedatives are not an option", "[[Torture/Legends|torture]], or repair?", and "you organics are so fragile", indicating their enjoyment of painful operations.

==Behind the scenes==
Like all the medical droids used by the CIS in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', the ADK-25-MED has a sadistic love of torturous surgery.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
